note: P0 fix: web wallet sighash mismatch. The previous v161 commit accidentally encoded payload_len as u16 LE (2 bytes) inside the hashOutputs preimage, but the C++ verifier (src/tx_signer.cpp ComputeHashOutputs) encodes it as a single byte. The result: every TX from the web wallet — even ones without a capsule — would have produced a sighash that disagreed with the node, and would have been rejected with an invalid-signature error. Wire serialization (TxOutput::Serialize) still uses u16 LE; only the sighash path was corrected. The asymmetry is consensus-defined and now documented inline. Added a defensive 255-byte cap inside buildAndSignTx (matches the sighash poison threshold) and an explicit refusal to combine capsule attach with multi-recipient sendmany — that path will land in a follow-up. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) any open wallet tab before sending.
